creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
Editing text in scribus' story editor ends up in crippled text! Whenever text is inserted in the middle of an existing text, edited or appended to, the result may be a truncated, mixed up or crippled text completely unusable. This also happens when editing text and it seems to be obviously right, then accepting the text, but in several cases the newly edited text gets not correctly taken by scribus. This way, several projects got affected in a severe way. Sometimes scribus dies immidiately with SIGNAL 11.

How-To-Repeat: Edit some text with the story editor in a scribus project.
